title: piper excelsum subsp. excelsum
intro: Piper excelsum subsp. excelsum, also known as Kava or Piper methysticum, is a plant species native to the South Pacific region, particularly in the islands of Vanuatu, Fiji, and Hawaii. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and anxiolytic effects, and is traditionally used to treat anxiety, stress, and restlessness. The health benefits of Piper excelsum subsp. excelsum include reducing muscle tension and pain, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of insomnia and depression. The plant is commonly prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also used in traditional ceremonies and rituals in the Pacific Islands.
